Uses of Interface
javax.microedition.rms.RecordFilter

  • Packages that use RecordFilter 
    Package Description
    javax.microedition.rms  

    • Uses of RecordFilter in javax.microedition.rms

      Methods in javax.microedition.rms with parameters of type RecordFilter 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      RecordEnumeration RecordStore.enumerateRecords(RecordFilter filter, RecordComparator comparator, boolean keepUpdated)
      Returns an enumeration for traversing a set of records in the record store in an optionally specified order.
      RecordEnumeration RecordStore.enumerateRecords(RecordFilter filter, RecordComparator comparator, boolean keepUpdated, int[] tags)
      Returns an enumeration for traversing a set of records in the record store in an optionally specified order.
